text: function canvasApp() { if (!canvassupport()) { return; } function drawScreen () { context.fillstyle = '#EEEEE'; context.fillRect(o, O, theCanvas.width, theCanvas.height); //Box context.strokeStyle = '#oooooo'; context.strokeRect(1, 1, theCanvas.width-2, theCanvas.height-2); ball.x += xunits; ball.y += yunits; context.fillstyle = "#oooooo"; context.beginPath(); context.arc(ball.x, ball.y,15,0,Math.PI*2, true); context.closePath(); context.fill(); if (ball.x > thecanvas.width |I ball.x < 0 ) { angle = 180 - angle; updateBall(); } else if (ball.y > thecanvas.height |I ball.y < o) { angle = 360 - angle; updateBall(); } } function updateBall() { radians = angle * Math.PI/ 180; xunits = Math.cos(radians) * speed; yunits = Math.sin(radians) * speed; } var speed = 5; var p1 = {x:20,y:20}; var angle = 35; var radians = 0; var xunits = 0; var yunits = 0; var bal1 = {x:p1.x, y:p1.y}; updateBall(); thecanvas = document.getElementById("canvasone"); context = thecanvas.getContext("2d"); setInterval(drawScreen, 33); }
